TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Wikipitiya_nu_Sakizaya, title = Wikipitiya_nu_Sakizaya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipitiya_nu_Sakizaya} }

S.FORM: Wikipitiya nu Sakizaya hananay sa, u saayaway nu Taywan a binacadan.
S.PHON: wikipitija nu sakizaja ħananaj sa, u saajawaj nu tajwan a binaʦadan.
S.FORM: Wikipitiya nu Sakizaya hananay sa, u saayaway nu Taywan a binacadan.
S.PHON: wikipitija nu sakizaja ħananaj sa, u saajawaj nu tajwan a binaʦadan.
